title: Rewards
content:
Said a great Congregational preacher
     To a hen, "You're a beautiful creature."
        And the hen, just for that,
        Laid an egg in his hat,
     And thus did the Hen reward Beecher.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Rewards", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
